nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Rose-throated becard
nodes.summary: Rose-throated becard（Rose-throated becard，学名 Pachyramphus aglaiae），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，常见栖息地包括灌丛、湿地。

nodes.name: 湿地
nodes.summary: 浅水、沼泽与植被斑块组成的高生产力生态系统。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Birds in the rest of the range can be found in a wider variety of forest habitats as well as scrubland in wet and semi-arid climates, where they can forage in open or semi-open areas

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Other habitat types include hedgerows, moist subtropical forests, and wetlands. left|thumb|In Cayo District, [[Belize
